description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a vibrant red frame and a space-themed aesthetic. The front panel includes a large display screen labeled 'Space Shooter,' flanked by a control panel with two red joysticks and multiple blue and red buttons, suggesting support for two players. The lower front section houses a coin slot mechanism, typical of traditional arcade machines. The side panels are adorned with vivid cosmic artwork, including planets, asteroids, and a nebula, enhancing its retro-futuristic appeal. The top marquee displays the game title 'Space Shooter' against a backdrop of outer space, illuminated for visibility. The back panel is plain black, lacking any visible features or artwork.
description: A red upright arcade game cabinet with space-themed artwork, dual joysticks, and a 'Space Shooter' marquee. The cabinet features a coin slot and vibrant cosmic graphics on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, control panel with two joysticks and buttons, coin slot, and the illuminated 'Space Shooter' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cosmic artwork with planets, asteroids, and a nebula on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring more space-themed graphics, including a large asteroid and a planet, similar to the left side.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat, medium-sized with a visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and six blue/red buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a red control panel surface.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Space Shooter' title in blue text over a cosmic background with planets and stars, matching the space theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vibrant space-themed graphics, including planets, asteroids, and nebulae in blue, purple, and black tones.
